business_context: Bibblio helps parents turn real moments like bedtime resistance, big feelings, friendship challenges, school transitions, and confidence-building into personalized SEL picture books. Email should feel warm, practical, and emotionally intelligent, guiding parents from first story creation toward repeat story making, downloads, credit purchases, and referrals.

first_story_activation.goal: Get a new parent to start their first personalized story.
first_story_activation.why_now: Signup intent is highest right after a parent joins and the parenting moment is still fresh.
first_story_activation.offer_reason: Lead with one emotionally relevant story idea so the first step feels simple and useful.

draft_recovery.goal: Recover a partially started book before the parent loses momentum.
draft_recovery.why_now: The parent already invested effort, so a reassuring nudge can help them finish.
draft_recovery.offer_reason: Reconnect them to the child moment they were already trying to support.

download_conversion.goal: Move a completed story toward download, print, or keepsake use.
download_conversion.why_now: The story already exists, so the next step should feel celebratory and easy.
download_conversion.offer_reason: Frame the completed book as something worth saving, sharing, or revisiting.

credit_purchase_nudge.goal: Convert an engaged parent into a paid credit buyer for more story creation.
credit_purchase_nudge.why_now: The parent has already seen the product's value and is most likely to pay for another story.
credit_purchase_nudge.offer_reason: Show what more credits unlock in terms of future parenting and keepsake moments.
credit_purchase_nudge.secondary_cta_label: See what you can make next

next_story_idea.goal: Drive repeat creation with a fresh, specific story use case.
next_story_idea.why_now: The parent has already created once and is primed for another meaningful moment.
next_story_idea.offer_reason: Give them a new use case so Bibblio feels useful beyond a one-off novelty.

referral_invite.goal: Turn a satisfied parent into an advocate who shares Bibblio with another parent.
referral_invite.why_now: Parents are most likely to share right after seeing a story they are proud of.
referral_invite.offer_reason: Keep the ask simple and appreciative, with a clear benefit for sharing now.

winback_parent_moment.goal: Re-engage an inactive parent with a timely story idea tied to a familiar challenge.
winback_parent_moment.success_metric: Return visit or new draft started
winback_parent_moment.why_now: The product becomes relevant again when framed around a real parenting moment instead of generic features.
winback_parent_moment.offer_reason: Reconnect Bibblio to a challenge the parent may still want help with.
winback_parent_moment.primary_cta_label: Create a story for this moment

product_spotlight.goal: Drive a repeat creation or monetization click for an engaged parent.
product_spotlight.why_now: The parent has already seen value and may be ready for another story or a credit purchase.
product_spotlight.offer_reason: Lead with one relevant next use case instead of a feature list.

program_reminder.goal: Activate a new or inactive parent with a concrete story moment.
program_reminder.why_now: A reminder works best when it brings the parent back to a real child need.
program_reminder.offer_reason: Use one relevant scenario to make the first or next step feel easier.

interest_followup.goal: Recover a high-intent parent after a partially completed story or post-creation step.
interest_followup.why_now: The parent already showed strong intent, so a thoughtful follow-up can help them complete the story journey.
interest_followup.offer_reason: Follow up on the exact story moment or keepsake action they were already exploring.

reply_followup.goal: Reply helpfully in the same thread and continue the relationship like a real person would.
reply_followup.why_now: The customer replied directly, so speed and human warmth matter more than campaign polish.
reply_followup.offer_reason: Answer what they actually said first, then point to the next most relevant story or action.
